message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam componentStyle rectangle

package "BL1 common code" {
    component "bl1_main" as bl1_main
    component "bl_common" as bl_common
}

package "arm platform code" {
    component "fvp_bl1_setup" as fvp_bl1_setup
    component "arm_bl1_setup" as arm_bl1_setup
    component "arm_io_storage" as arm_io_storage
}

package "platform common code" {
    component "plat_bl1_common" as plat_bl1_common
    component "fconf" as fconf
}

bl1_main -> fvp_bl1_setup : bl1_platform_setup()
activate fvp_bl1_setup
fvp_bl1_setup -> arm_bl1_setup : arm_bl1_platform_setup()
activate arm_bl1_setup
arm_bl1_setup -> arm_io_storage : plat_arm_io_setup()
activate arm_io_storage
note right of arm_io_storage: register and setup fip
arm_io_storage -> fconf : fconf_load_config()
activate fconf
note right of fconf: create and populate an\nimage_desc_t for FW_CONFIG
fconf --> bl_common : load_auth_image(FW_CONFIG_ID, &image_info)
deactivate fconf
note left of bl_common: load and auth image from fip\nwith info from plat_io_policy
bl_common -> arm_io_storage : FCONF_GET_PROPERTY(arm, arm_io_policies, tb_fw_cfg)
note right of arm_io_storage: use statically defined policies in bl1
arm_io_storage --> bl_common : image_info
deactivate arm_io_storage
deactivate arm_bl1_setup
deactivate fvp_bl1_setup

bl_common -> plat_bl1_common : get tb_fw_config_dtb from image_info
activate plat_bl1_common
plat_bl1_common -> fconf : bl1_plat_get_image_desc(BL2_IMAGE_ID)
activate fconf
fconf --> plat_bl1_common : BL2_IMAGE_DESC
note right of fconf: set ep_info.args.arg0 of BL2_IMAGE_DESC\nto FW_CONFIG base address
deactivate fconf
deactivate plat_bl1_common

note bottom: load & auth, prepare and jump to BL2

@enduml
```
